Figure 2 Relationship between percentage engraftment and vector copy number to levels of HbF and F-cells in peripheral blood of gene therapy
treated sickle cell disease mice. Percentages of RBC HbF (a,b) or circulating F-cells (c,d) versus % donor engraftment (a,c) or vector copy number per
cell (b,d) measured in circulating mononuclear cells at 18 weeks post-transplantation. Regression lines (rs) and P values were calculated by Spearman’s
rank order analysis. Each symbol represents an individual mouse.
Table 2 Therapeutic efficacy of the insulated γ-globin vector in sickle cell disease mice given subablative conditioning
